value.description: Value of the region in which the resource will be located. Available regions at present: - ITBG-Bergamo For more information, check the documentation.

location.description: Contains information about the Region of a resource
location.title: LocationDto

tags.description: List of tags for the resource

value.description:
Value of the version.
In updating an existing cluster, the upgrade of the version will be handled as soon as the request will be sent 
only if the UpgradeDate is not evaluated

upgradeDate.description: You can choose to upgrade the kubernetes version of an existing cluster in a scheduled date

instance.description: Configuration name of the nodes. See metadata section of the API documentation for an updated list of admissable values.

dataCenter.description: Datacenter in which the nodes of the pool will be located. See metadata section of the API documentation for an updated list of admissable values. For more information, check the documentation.

minCount.description: Min number of nodes for the node pool when autoscaling is enabled

maxCount.description: Max number of nodes for the node pool when autoscaling is enabled

autoscaling.description: Indicate if autoscaling is enabled for the node pool

nodePools.description: list of the nodepools of the kaas

ha.description:
If true, the the cluster will be replicated across 3 zones within the region selected.
Please note that the Control Panel in HA cannot be disabled once the cluster has been created.

maxCumulativeVolumeSize.description:
Storage limit for this Kubernetes cluster.
The sum of the size of all the volumes used by the cluster must be less than this value, if specified.
Default value is null and no limitation will be applied.
